steps.expected: CLI handles missing days gracefully, produces output for available days only
steps.observed: CLI completed successfully. Week 2025-W52: 4 forex_days (Dec 22-24, 26 — Dec 25 missing), 4712 bars_1m (vs 7200 full week), 6213 detections

steps.action: Measure per-week generation time from CLI output
steps.observed: Average 3.4s/week across 3 full-data weeks. Extrapolated 26 weeks = 88.4s = 1.5 min, well under 3 min target

steps.action: Compare weeks.json detection_count vs actual count in detection files
steps.observed: W42: manifest=9561, file=9561, match=True. W43: manifest=9566, file=9566, match=True.

steps.action: du -sh on each week's files (detections + candles + sessions)
steps.observed: W42: 3.80MB total, W43: 3.81MB total — both well under 10MB

summary: Tested 12 CLI assertions: all 12 passed. detect.py generates correct per-week detection/candle/session files with proper structure, slim format (no qualifies, 324 bytes avg), accurate counts, graceful holiday handling, and good performance (~3.4s/week, extrapolated 26 weeks in 1.5 min).
